content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "邀請吃晚餐",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你明天晚上有空嗎？我想邀請你一起吃晚餐。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ míngtiān wǎnshàng yǒu kòng ma? Wǒ xiǎng yāoqǐng nǐ yīqǐ chī wǎncān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 ming2tian1 wan3shang4 you3 kong4 ma5? Wo3 xiang3 yao1qing3 ni3 yi1qi3 chi1 wan3can1.",
          "translation_en": "Are you free tomorrow evening? I'd like to invite you to have dinner together.",
          "translation_ko": "내일 저녁에 시간 있으세요? 같이 저녁 식사하자고 초대하고 싶어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "明天晚上可以啊！我們去哪裡吃？",
          "pinyin": "Míngtiān wǎnshàng kěyǐ a! Wǒmen qù nǎlǐ chī?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ming2tian1 wan3shang4 ke3yi3 a5! Wo3men qu4 na3li3 chi1?",
          "translation_en": "Tomorrow evening works! Where should we go eat?",
          "translation_ko": "내일 저녁 괜찮아요! 어디로 먹으러 갈까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我推薦一家牛肉麵店，在車站附近，很好吃。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ tuījiàn yī jiā niúròumiàn diàn, zài chēzhàn fùjìn, hěn hǎochī.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 tui1jian4 yi1 jia1 niu2rou4mian4 dian4, zai4 che1zhan4 fu4jin4, hen3 hao3chi1.",
          "translation_en": "I recommend a beef noodle shop near the station; it's very tasty.",
          "translation_ko": "역 근처에 있는 소고기 국수 가게를 추천해요, 아주 맛있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好啊！我喜歡吃牛肉麵。我們約幾點？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a! Wǒ xǐhuān chī niúròumiàn. Wǒmen yuē jǐ diǎn?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a5! Wo3 xi3huan1 chi1 niu2rou4mian4. Wo3men yue1 ji3 dian3?",
          "translation_en": "Great! I like eating beef noodles. What time should we meet?",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요! 소고기 국수 좋아해요. 몇 시에 만날까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我們約六點半在餐廳門口碰面，可以嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒmen yuē liù diǎn bàn zài cāntīng ménkǒu pèngmiàn, kěyǐ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3men yue1 liu4 dian3 ban4 zai4 can1ting1 men2kou3 peng4mian4, ke3yi3 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Let's meet at 6:30 at the restaurant entrance, okay?",
          "translation_ko": "6시 30분에 식당 입구에서 만날까요, 괜찮으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒問題啊！明天見。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí a! Míngtiān jiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2 a5! Ming2tian1 jian4.",
          "translation_en": "No problem! See you tomorrow.",
          "translation_ko": "문제없어요! 내일 뵙겠습니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did A invite B to do?",
          "question_ko": "A는 B에게 무엇을 초대했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Have dinner together", "Go to a movie", "Drink coffee"],
          "options_ko": ["같이 저녁 식사하기", "영화 보러 가기", "커피 마시기"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice inviting a friend to dinner. Say: '你明天晚上有空嗎？我想邀請你一起吃晚餐。'"
    },
    {
      "title": "改時間",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "不好意思，我臨時有事，明天的約會可以改時間嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Bùhǎoyìsi, wǒ línshí yǒu shì, míngtiān de yuēhuì kěyǐ gǎi shíjiān ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4hao3yi4si5, wo3 lin2shi2 you3 shi4, ming2tian1 de5 yue1hui4 ke3yi3 gai3 shi2jian1 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Sorry, something came up suddenly. Can we reschedule tomorrow's appointment?",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 갑자기 일이 생겨서 내일 약속 시간을 변경할 수 있을까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒問題啊。你想改到什麼時候？",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí a. Nǐ xiǎng gǎi dào shénme shíhou?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2 a5. Ni3 xiang3 gai3 dao4 shen2me shi2hou5?",
          "translation_en": "No problem. When would you like to change it to?",
          "translation_ko": "문제없어요. 언제로 변경하고 싶으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "後天下午三點方便嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Hòutiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn fāngbiàn ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hou4tian1 xia4wu3 san1 dian3 fang1bian4 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Is the day after tomorrow at 3 PM convenient?",
          "translation_ko": "모레 오후 3시에 괜찮으세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "後天下午三點我可以。那我們改到後天下午三點。",
          "pinyin": "Hòutiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn wǒ kěyǐ. Nà wǒmen gǎi dào hòutiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hou4tian1 xia4wu3 san1 dian3 wo3 ke3yi3. Na4 wo3men gai3 dao4 hou4tian1 xia4wu3 san1 dian3.",
          "translation_en": "The day after tomorrow at 3 PM works for me. Then let's change it to that time.",
          "translation_ko": "모레 오후 3시 괜찮아요. 그럼 모레 오후 3시로 변경할게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "太好了！謝謝你。我們後天見。",
          "pinyin": "Tài hǎo le! Xièxiè nǐ. Wǒmen hòutiān jiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Tai4 hao3 le5! Xie4xie4 ni3. Wo3men hou4tian1 jian4.",
          "translation_en": "Great! Thank you. See you the day after tomorrow.",
          "translation_ko": "정말 좋아요! 감사합니다. 모레 뵙겠습니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why did A want to change the time?",
          "question_ko": "A가 시간을 변경하려는 이유는 무엇입니까?",
          "options_en": ["Something came up", "He forgot", "He was tired"],
          "options_ko": ["갑자기 일이 생겨서", "잊어버려서", "피곤해서"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice rescheduling a plan. Say: '不好意思，我臨時有事，明天的約會可以改時間嗎？'"
    },
    {
      "title": "婉拒邀請",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "這個週末我們一起去夜市吃東西，好不好？",
          "pinyin": "Zhège zhōumò wǒmen yīqǐ qù yèshì chī dōngxi, hǎo bù hǎo?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4ge5 zhou1mo4 wo3men yi1qi3 qu4 ye4shi4 chi1 dong1xi5, hao3 bu4 hao3?",
          "translation_en": "This weekend, let's go to the night market to eat together, okay?",
          "translation_ko": "이번 주말에 같이 야시장에 가서 먹을까요, 어떠세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "謝謝你的邀請，可是這個週末我已經有行程了，沒辦法去。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxiè nǐ de yāoqǐng, kěshì zhège zhōumò wǒ yǐjīng yǒu xíngchéng le, méi bànfǎ qù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie4 ni3 de5 yao1qing3, ke3shi4 zhe4ge5 zhou1mo4 wo3 yi3jing1 you3 xing2cheng2 le5, mei2 ban4fa3 qu4.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you for the invitation, but I already have plans this weekend, so I can't go.",
          "translation_ko": "초대해 주셔서 감사합니다만, 이번 주말에 이미 일정이 있어서 갈 수 없어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "沒關係，那我們改天再約。",
          "pinyin": "Méi guānxi, nà wǒmen gǎitiān zài yuē.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 guan1xi5, na4 wo3men gai3tian1 zai4 yue1.",
          "translation_en": "No problem, then let's plan another day.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아요, 그럼 다음에 다시 만나요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好啊！下次有空的時候再一起去。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a! Xià cì yǒu kòng de shíhou zài yīqǐ qù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a5! Xia4 ci4 you3 kong4 de5 shi2hou5 zai4 yi1qi3 qu4.",
          "translation_en": "Great! Let's go together next time when we're free.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요! 다음에 시간 될 때 같이 가요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why did B decline the invitation?",
          "question_ko": "B가 초대를 거절한 이유는 무엇입니까?",
          "options_en": ["Already had plans", "Was sick", "Didn't like night markets"],
          "options_ko": ["이미 일정이 있어서", "아파서", "야시장을 좋아하지 않아서"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and intonation.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice politely declining an invitation. Say: '謝謝你的邀請，可是這個週末我已經有行程了，沒辦法去。'"
    }
  ]
}
